title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: Art Exhibition
questions.text: Students whose work is in the exhibition may invite two guests to the opening evening. Please give their names to the office by Monday, so security staff know who is expected.
questions.question: What must students do?

options.B: Register the people they want to invite.
options.A: Collect their artwork from the office.
options.C: Pay for guests before Monday morning.

questions.explanation: Students must give guest names to the office.

questions.heading: Message from Nathan to Izzy
questions.text: Izzy, I borrowed your calculator for the test and forgot to give it back. I’ll put it in your locker before lunch unless you need it for first lesson. Sorry about that!
questions.question: Why is Nathan texting Izzy?

options.C: To explain when he will return something.
options.A: To ask if he can borrow her calculator.
options.B: To tell her the test is before lunch.

questions.explanation: Nathan explains he still has the calculator and when he will return it.

questions.heading: Photography Walk
questions.text: Bring a phone or camera and learn how to take better photos of buildings. The walk is free, but places must be booked online because the group leader can only take twelve people.
questions.question: What does the advert say?

options.A: People need to reserve a place first.
options.B: People must pay online before joining.
options.C: People can only use professional cameras.

questions.explanation: Places must be booked online because the group is limited.

questions.heading: From: Aunt Helen / Subject: Saturday
questions.text: I’m happy to take you shopping on Saturday, but I have to leave town by three. If you want to look for shoes as well as a jacket, we should go as soon as the shops open.
questions.question: What does Aunt Helen mean?

options.B: They need an early start to do everything.
options.A: They cannot go shopping on Saturday.
options.C: She only has time to buy shoes.

questions.explanation: She has limited time, so they should go when shops open.

questions.heading: Homework Club
questions.text: Homework club is moving to Room 14 while the library is being painted. You can still use laptops there, but printing will not be available until the library opens again next week.
questions.question: What is different about homework club?

options.C: One service is temporarily unavailable this week.
options.A: Students cannot use laptops this week.
options.B: The club has closed until next week.

questions.explanation: Printing is not available until the library reopens.
